summary: Testing 'Ново СМР' Flow (Phase 2) - Complete. Backend: 16/16 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All features working - page loads with project context, multi-row input works, AI analysis (two-stage fast+LLM), editable proposals with badges, selective save with checkboxes, navigation back to project after save.
critical_code_review_comments: NovoSMRPage.js correctly implements two-phase UI (input -> results)
AI fast endpoint returns proposals instantly with rule-based provider
AI refine runs in background and updates proposals to LLM provider when complete
batch-save correctly creates drafts with batch_id linking them together
Location data (floor/room/zone) preserved through entire flow
Navigation after save works correctly (navigates back to /projects/{id})
seed_data_creation: Used existing project PRJ-001 (c3529276-8c03-49b3-92de-51216aab25da). Created TEST_ prefixed drafts for testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Novo SMR Flow (Phase 2) fully tested. Key route: /projects/{id}/novo-smr. Key endpoints: POST /api/extra-works/ai-fast (instant), POST /api/extra-works/ai-refine (LLM), POST /api/extra-works/batch-save (creates drafts). Test file: /app/backend/tests/test_novo_smr_flow.py. UI uses testids: novo-smr-page, smr-row-{i}, smr-text-{i}, analyze-btn, proposal-row-{i}, back-to-input-btn, save-draft-btn, save-ready-btn, save-draft-btn-bottom, save-ready-btn-bottom.

Frontend /projects/{id}/novo-smr page lo.notes: Page shows project code (PRJ-001) and name, city defaults to 'София'

Frontend multi-row input with text + uni.notes: Input rows have description field, unit selector (м2), qty input, and location fields (Етаж, Помещение, Зона/стена)

Frontend add/remove/duplicate row button.notes: 'Добави ред' adds new row, trash icon removes row, copy icon duplicates row

Frontend 'Анализирай с AI' button trigge.notes: Button shows count '(N реда)', triggers API call to ai-fast endpoint

Frontend results phase shows editable pr.notes: Proposals have editable fields: Описание, Мярка, К-во, Мат. лв/ед, Труд лв/ед, Общо/ед

Frontend each proposal has checkbox for.notes: Checkbox visible and functional, all checked by default

Frontend provider badge (Rule/LLM), conf.notes: Shows 'Rule 85%' initially, updates to 'LLM 90%' after refine completes

Frontend internal price hint badge when.notes: Shows 'Вътр. 17.7-20.5 (2x)' format when historical data available

Frontend 'Редактирай и пресметни' button.notes: Button returns to input phase with edited values preserved

Frontend 'Запази (N реда, X лв)' button.notes: Saves selected proposals as drafts, navigates back to project page

Backend POST /api/extra-works/batch-save.notes: Returns {ok, saved_count, batch_id, draft_ids}, all drafts have same batch_id

Backend saved drafts have correct projec.notes: Verified via GET endpoint - all fields preserved correctly

mocked_apis.note: No mocked APIs - Real AI (rule-based fast + LLM refine)
